what_was_built: reports/crypto_d1_operator_missing_items_checklist_v1/checklist.json (machine-readable operator checklist template: 11 safety flags pinned False; research_only + read_only True; lane crypto_d1_protocol; BTC/ETH/SOL spot 1d 24/7; weekday-only filters forbidden; exactly 16 items numbered 1-16; each item carries the 9 required fields (number, name, status, operator_answer, evidence_path, reviewer_notes, approval_status, blocking_reason, next_action); item_status_options = MISSING/COMPLETE/BLOCKED/NOT_APPLICABLE; approval_status_options = PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED/WITHDRAWN; default state pins every item at MISSING/PENDING with empty operator_answer + evidence_path + reviewer_notes + blocking_reason; default overall_readiness_status = NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA; checklist_completion_gate + trading_gate (explicitly_forbidden) future-authorization gates; lane_recommendation pinned WATCH/MIXED with do_not_promote_to_ACTIVE/STRONG=True; safety_boundaries + no_profit_claim_policy carrying the 8 verbatim distinction phrases)

reports/crypto_d1_operator_missing_items_checklist_v1/checklist.md (human-readable checklist with disclaimer header and sections 0-13: what this checklist is, lane+scope, item status options, approval status options, the 16-item table, per-item required fields, anti-fake-completion rules, consistency rule, what the checklist does NOT authorize, allowed next steps, forbidden next steps, registry status, safety boundaries, no-profit-claim policy)

tools/crypto_d1_operator_missing_items_checklist_check.py (stdlib-only validator; argparse/json/pathlib/__future__ only; validate + show subcommands; enforces schema, 11 False safety flags, scope pin (lane/assets/market/timeframe/calendar), exactly 16 items numbered 1..16 with the 9 required fields, status + approval_status enums, default overall_readiness_status NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA, anti-fake-completion (COMPLETE requires non-empty evidence_path AND approval_status=APPROVED), BLOCKED requires non-empty blocking_reason, consistency rule (any COMPLETE item with overall NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA requires override_reason), lane_recommendation WATCH/MIXED with no ACTIVE/STRONG promotion, 8 distinction phrases verbatim in BOTH md and json, no forbidden capability phrase in either doc)

tests/test_crypto_d1_operator_missing_items_checklist.py (stdlib + pytest; existence + validation; eleven safety flags False; scope pin; exactly 16 items numbered 1..16 with all 9 fields; default state (all MISSING/PENDING/empty); 4-value enum lists; default overall_readiness_status NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA; lane WATCH/MIXED + no ACTIVE/STRONG; trading_gate forbidden; checklist_completion_gate requirements; 8 user-required verbatim phrases in MD; distinction phrases in BOTH docs; no forbidden phrases; no data/crypto_d1_research/; no real-data files in checklist dir; bundle dir contains only 4 expected docs; validator failure modes (tampered flag, invalid status, invalid approval_status, dropped item, missing field, fake-completion empty evidence, fake-completion PENDING approval, BLOCKED without reason, inconsistent overall status, promotion tamper, STRONG tamper, missing distinction phrase, forbidden phrase) + a happy partial-completion path; validator stdlib-only; no network/broker/subprocess/env tokens; CLI validate+show smoke; all 9 prior Crypto-D1 validators still pass; arbitrage readiness still passes; registry classifies crypto_d1 as WATCH/never-ACTIVE/never-STRONG with checklist.md + checklist.json in source_reports; registry validator still passes)
files_NOT_changed: app.py and templates/*.html (NOT touched -- no JARVIS UI changes)
All prior Crypto-D1 spec docs (Bundles 11-21) + arbitrage validators NOT modified
data/crypto_d1_research/ NOT created (the checklist is a template; no data path is created)

scope_summary.pipeline_position: Operator-side companion to the Bundle 21 readiness gate; turns the gate's 16-item missing-items prose into a fillable, schema-validated template with anti-fake-completion checks. Adds no automation.

candidate_registry_status_after_build.note: The crypto_d1_protocol seed extra_files were extended with checklist.md + checklist.json for traceability only. The lane stays WATCH; evidence does NOT become STRONG; the candidate is NOT marked ACTIVE. Promotion to ACTIVE still requires real operator-supplied data + QA_PASS + a separately authorized backtest.

what_was_executed_in_this_bundle: ONLY the new validator (validate + show) and the test suite. NO real dataset was acquired, placed, QA-checked, or backtested. No data directory was created. No item in the default checklist was marked COMPLETE.
recommended_next_bundle: Operator step (NOT a bundle): operator follows the Bundle 20 runbook, fills items 1-13 in this checklist with evidence_path + approval_status=APPROVED for each. After each fill, re-run python tools/crypto_d1_operator_missing_items_checklist_check.py validate to catch fake-completion or inconsistency. After items 1-13 COMPLETE, operator runs the Bundle 19 QA tool to populate item 14, then accepts QA_PASS or attaches QA_WARN acceptance memo for item 15. Item 16 requires a separately authorized backtest bundle.

Crypto-D1 Baseline Results Report v1 (separately authorized; only AFTER operator has supplied data, reached QA_PASS or accepted QA_WARN, and run the backtest runner to produce output; documents the operator-reviewed run + pins verdict + caveats. Spec bundle; Claude works.)

Crypto-D1 Backtest Runner v2 (future) -- walk-forward + per-family parameter sweep + structured sensitivity sweep + per-strategy report emitter matching the full Bundle 15 schema. (Code bundle; recommend Codex.)
no_profit_claim_policy: A checklist is not strategy validation.
Specification completeness is not data readiness.
QA_PASS does not authorize automatic backtesting.
QA_PASS does not authorize paper trading.
QA_PASS does not authorize live trading.
No real data has entered SPARTA.
A good historical chart does not imply future returns.
